text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, summer camp comes to a close...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm never going to whine or complain again,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I swear upon this very ocean! I'm not going to
hang my head even once during the fall of my
classic year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm going to keep my eyes on the prize and move forward! So make sure you keep your eyes on me too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a firm expression on her face, Kitasan Black
stands tall as she stares out at the ocean. Just
then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's a pretty stoic expression you have on
there, Kitasan Black. Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Bakushin O. I just happened to realize
something important.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, to put it simply, I realized I...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Have to go FULL BAKUSHIN! I guess that was the
answer all along.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! So you finally realized it! Yeah, you're
exactly right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You'll be able to make it as long as you press on
without hesitating! Now let's charge forward
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other racers' ways of living and the Bakushin
spirit that Kitasan Black inherited meld into one.
Only hellbent dedication will be able to throw
open the heavy doors of fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to witnessing Kitasan Black's
unwavering determination put into play this fall.
